creator: ler@airmail.net
text:
Try to compile althea port, get the following:

===>  Building for althea-0.5.5
Warning: Object directory not changed from original /usr/ports/mail/althea/work/althea-0.5.5
c++  -O -pipe -march=pentiumpro -DPACKAGE=\"althea\" -DDOCDIR=\"/usr/local/share/doc/althea\" -DPIXDIR=\"/usr/local/share/althea\" -DLOCALEDIR=\"/usr/local/share/locale\" -DMAIL_POLL_INTERVAL=60000 `/usr/X11R6/bin/gtk12-config --cflags` -I/usr/include -c save_config.cpp
/usr/include/g++/stl_list.h: In method `list<basic_string<char,string_char_traits<char>,__default_alloc_template<false,0> >,allocator<basic_string<char,string_char_traits<char>,__default_alloc_template<false,0> > > >::list(const list<basic_string<char,string_char_traits<char>,__default_alloc_template<false,0> >,allocator<basic_string<char,string_char_traits<char>,__default_alloc_template<false,0> > > > &)':
/usr/include/g++/stl_list.h:434: template instantiation depth exceeds maximum of 17
/usr/include/g++/stl_list.h:434:  (use -ftemplate-depth-NN to increase the maximum)
/usr/include/g++/stl_list.h:434:   instantiating `list<basic_string<char,string_char_traits<char>,__default_alloc_template<false,0> >,allocator<basic_string<char,string_char_traits<char>,__default_alloc_template<false,0> > > >::get_allocator() const'
/usr/include/g++/stl_list.h:434:   instantiated from `list<basic_string<char,string_char_traits<char>,__default_alloc_template<false,0> >,allocator<basic_string<char,string_char_traits<char>,__default_alloc_template<false,0> > > >::list(const list<basic_string<char,string_char_traits<char>,__default_alloc_template<false,0> >,allocator<basic_string<char,string_char_traits<char>,__default_alloc_template<false,0> > > > &)'
/usr/include/g++/stl_construct.h:48:   instantiated from `construct<Message, Message>(Message *, const Message &)'
/usr/include/g++/stl_list.h:293:   instantiated from `list<Message,allocator<Message> >::_M_create_node(const Message &)'
/usr/include/g++/stl_list.h:344:   instantiated from `list<Message,allocator<Message> >::insert(_List_iterator<Message,Message &,Message *>, const Message &)'
/usr/include/g++/stl_list.h:559:   instantiated from `list<Message,allocator<Message> >::_M_insert_dispatch<_List_iterator<Message,const Message &,const Message *> >(_List_iterator<Message,Message &,Message *>, _List_iterator<Message,const Message &,const Message *>, _List_iterator<Message,const Message &,const Message *>, __false_type)'
/usr/include/g++/stl_list.h:369:   instantiated from `list<Message,allocator<Message> >::insert<_List_iterator<Message,const Message &,const Message *> >(_List_iterator<Message,Message &,Message *>, _List_iterator<Message,const Message &,const Message *>, _List_iterator<Message,const Message &,const Message *>)'
/usr/include/g++/stl_list.h:435:   instantiated from `list<Message,allocator<Message> >::list(const list<Message,allocator<Message> > &)'
/usr/include/g++/stl_construct.h:48:   instantiated from `construct<Folder, Folder>(Folder *, const Folder &)'
/usr/include/g++/stl_list.h:293:   instantiated from `list<Folder,allocator<Folder> >::_M_create_node(const Folder &)'
/usr/include/g++/stl_list.h:344:   instantiated from `list<Folder,allocator<Folder> >::insert(_List_iterator<Folder,Folder &,Folder *>, const Folder &)'
/usr/include/g++/stl_list.h:559:   instantiated from `list<Folder,allocator<Folder> >::_M_insert_dispatch<_List_iterator<Folder,const Folder &,const Folder *> >(_List_iterator<Folder,Folder &,Folder *>, _List_iterator<Folder,const Folder &,const Folder *

How-To-Repeat: see above
